title: Receiving two Payload from monday.com

posts.author: Jorgemolina (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Community,

I am receiveing 2 payload from monday.com as follow, anyone knows that it is a normal behavior from monday.

Note: the first payload does not have the pulseId

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Jorgemolina!

Matias from Monday here.

Would you please send us an email to appsupport@monday.com so we can take a closer look into this?

I will be expecting your email!

Cheers,
Matias
